Title: Create backend/test_beta.py

Review the work done in this branch. Check:
1. Did execution follow the plan? (read plan.json, check the diff)
2. Did the plan follow from the research? (read research.json)
3. Were there obvious gaps in questions? (read questions.json)
4. Run tests if available.

}

SCOPE: Write ONLY to .fleet/tasks/ files. Do NOT modify production code.

BEFORE YOU STOP: git add -A && git commit --no-verify -m "validate: cgroup-freeze-test-001-question-child-beta"

"""Alpha greeting module."""

from __future__ import annotations


def greet_alpha() -> str:
    """Return a greeting for Alpha."""
    return "Hello Alpha"
